Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Process Description Step-by-Step Step 1 Arrival RG IA Order sequence Structure Sequence Sub-tree 1 -> ( A, -> ( RG, IA ) ) Step 2 Triage TI TC Order Sequence Structure -> ( TI, TC ) Connection to Step 1 Step 1 happens then Step 2 Combined so far -> ( -> ( A, -> ( RG, IA ) ), -> ( TI, TC ) ) Step 3 Initial Diagnostic Test Exclusive Choice CE or FBP Logic Exclusive Choice X Structure X ( CE, FBP )

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 4 Loop Abnormal Results loop commences SC Treatment TM or SPT RDT FCE or FBA loop repeats until normal Step 5 Advanced Imaging AI Nutritional Counseling true concurrency + ( AI, NC ) Step 6 Final Admin sequence FAS DDI -> ( FAS, DDI ) Step 7 Final Clearances parallel BL ICP MRF + ( BL, + ( ICP, MRF ) )

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Loop Structure Definition * ( A, B ) A is executed then either exit the loop or execute B and then A again map the text to * ( A, B ) A Loop Body Entry Specialist Consultation SC Treatment TM or SPT Re-Diagnostic RDT B tau silent step to represent the decision to loop back

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: LoopSeq -> ( SC, -> ( X ( TM, SPT ), X ( FCE, FBA ) ) ) LoopTree * ( LoopSeq, tau ) Structure InitialTest -> LoopTree

Name: Validation - NE
Text: If the results are abnormal a loop commences Once normal results are obtained the loop ends This implies the loop is conditional If normal immediately after Initial Test skip the loop X after Initial Test X ( Step5, Loop ) * operator executes A at least once If Initial Test normal should not do SC Treatment

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self-Correction on Loop Once the initial diagnostic test is done If abnormal loop commences Structure InitialTest -> X ( Step5, * ( LoopBody, tau ) ) Problem X terminates branch need merge after both paths Correction X ( -> ( Step5, FinalSteps ), -> ( * ( LoopBody, tau ), FinalSteps ) )

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Scenario A Initial Test Normal Skip Loop Step 5 Scenario B Initial Test Abnormal Loop Normal Step 5 If Scenario A possible need X after Initial Test If healthy patient should not see Specialist SC

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision on Loop Entry use * ( LoopBody, tau ) directly after InitialTest standard interpretation for Process Tree exercises Loop operator handles repetition condition abstracted into loop exit standard way to model Treatment Loop even if entry conditional
